subjects.description: Subject methods/types/files to audit. Symbols resolve through the standard resolver; path-like unresolved values are treated as file paths. Types/files expand to contained methods before traversal.

requiredAuthority.description: Authority symbols/types/namespaces/files that each subject should reach by outgoing non-Contains graph paths. Authority types/files expand to their contained symbols.

allowedAlternatives.description: Optional authority symbols/types/namespaces/files that are acceptable competing sources of truth. Reaching one is reported as evidence, but does not remove missing required-authority rows.

maxDepth.description: Maximum outgoing dependency traversal depth from each expanded subject seed. Default: 6.

excludeTests.description: Drop expanded subject seeds whose declaration path classifies to the Test bucket. Default false.

excludeGenerated.description: Drop expanded subject seeds whose declaration path classifies to the Generated bucket. Default false.

includeBuckets.description: Optional allowlist of subject seed buckets to keep (case-insensitive): Production / Test / Editor / Generated / Vendored. Empty / omitted = all buckets.
